testcase.name: Response has service name and version
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: f3222974-a6b4-428c-a654-001c40028b70. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab04 IoT Docker Verification. Request name: 01_Functional / GET health returns 200. Test description: Response has service name and version. Error message: expected { status: 'ok', …(2) } to have property 'version'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected { status: 'ok', …(2) } to have property 'version' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:1).

testsuite.name: 01_Functional / GET latest readings returns items array

testcase.name: Status code is 200

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: f3222974-a6b4-428c-a654-001c40028b70. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab04 IoT Docker Verification. testcase.name: Response has items array

testcase.name: Response reading_id matches saved variable
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: f3222974-a6b4-428c-a654-001c40028b70. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab04 IoT Docker Verification. Request name: 01_Functional / GET reading by saved reading_id returns 200. Test description: Response reading_id matches saved variable. Error message: expected undefined to deeply equal 'R-20260513-1234'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to deeply equal 'R-20260513-1234' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:4).

testcase.name: Missing token returns 401

failure.message: expected response to have status code 401 but got 201

testsuite.name: 03_Negative / POST reading missing device_id returns validation error

04_Boundary_Reliability / POST boundary temperature 80 is accepted with warning

testcase.name: High temperature response includes warning header

failure.message: expected false to deeply equal true

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: f3222974-a6b4-428c-a654-001c40028b70. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab04 IoT Docker Verification. Request name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST boundary temperature 80 is accepted with warning. Test description: High temperature response includes warning header. Error message: expected false to deeply equal true. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected false to deeply equal true at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:9).

testsuite.name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / GET health responds under 1000ms on local/container
